name: Q21914464
abstract: Dua Lipa (  DOO-ə LEE-pə; Albanian: [ˈdua ˈlipa] ; born 22 August 1995) is an English singer and songwriter. Her accolades include seven Brit Awards and three Grammy Awards.

about_quotes.speaker: Josiah Gluck
about_quotes.evidence: Interviewer mentions seeing a Hamilton alum playing bass with Dua Lipa; Interviewee responds 'Yeah she’s fun. She can sing, that’s a fun band.'
about_quotes.doc_title: Josiah Gluck interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 13, 2022
